title: A rancher reported 3 sightings in 15 days, of two round silver UFOs [1997]
excerpt: *NOTE:  Although the city where the sighting took place is not specified in the report, taking into account that the reporting witness lives in a neighborhood called “Bom Retiro” and that his occupation is “rural producer”, it was deduced that the only city found to have the neighborhood “Bom Retiro” as “Rural Zone” is the […]
text_preview:
*NOTE:  Although the city where the sighting took place is not specified in the report, taking into account that the reporting witness lives in a neighborhood called “Bom Retiro” and that his occupation is “rural producer”, it was deduced that the only city found to have the neighborhood “Bom Retiro” as “Rural Zone” is the city of Blumenau, in the State of Santa Catarina.

On the 25th of August, 1997, a rural producer and other person in the region of Bom Retiro*, reported to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] three sightings made by them over the past fifteen days (from the 10th t
summary: A rancher near Blumenau-SC reported three sightings over 15 days of two round silver UFOs on parallel descending paths; last sighting filmed on Aug 25, 1997.
